title: Fix admin panel access denial for authenticated owner principal

requirements.text: Fix the backend isCallerAdmin method in backend/main.mo to correctly authenticate the owner with principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' and return true instead of false, resolving the 'Access Denied' error shown in the uploaded screenshot where the principal ID is displayed but access is denied

quotes: You don't have permission to access the admin panel.

acceptanceCriteria: The backend isCallerAdmin method returns true when called by principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae'
The authenticated owner can access the admin panel without seeing 'Access Denied' message
The admin panel displays its content (system statistics, user identity, trending clips) after successful authentication

requirements.text: Verify the adminPrincipals HashMap initialization in backend/main.mo correctly stores the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' during actor initialization, ensuring the principal format matches exactly and the HashMap lookup succeeds during authentication checks
acceptanceCriteria: The adminPrincipals HashMap contains the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' after actor initialization
The HashMap lookup for this principal returns true during authentication checks
The principal format stored in the HashMap matches exactly with the caller principal format

requirements.text: Add comprehensive backend logging in the isCallerAdmin method to output: 1) the caller's principal using Principal.toText(), 2) the result of the adminPrincipals HashMap lookup (whether the principal exists), 3) the current size of the adminPrincipals HashMap, 4) all principals stored in the HashMap by iterating through entries for comparison, 5) the final boolean return value, enabling diagnosis of why authentication is failing for the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae'
acceptanceCriteria: Backend logs display the caller's principal in text format when isCallerAdmin is called
Backend logs show the HashMap lookup result (true/false) for the caller principal
Backend logs display the current size and all stored principals in the adminPrincipals HashMap
Backend logs show the final boolean value being returned by isCallerAdmin
Logs provide sufficient detail to diagnose principal comparison or HashMap lookup failures

constraints: Do not change the backend schema or add migration logic
Maintain the existing adminPrincipals HashMap structure in backend/main.mo
Preserve all existing authentication flow in the frontend
Do not modify the frontend admin route protection logic in App.tsx
Keep the existing useIsOwner hook implementation unchanged
nonGoals: Changing the admin authentication system to use user IDs instead of principals
Adding new admin management features or multi-admin support
Modifying the AdminPanel UI or component structure
Updating the frontend error messaging or access denied display
Adding new backend methods or API endpoints for admin management
